title: capnoides lutea
intro: Capnoides lutea, also known as Mexican gentian, is a plant species that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Capnoides lutea include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Capnoides lutea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
